# Express TODO REST API with CRUD Operations

## Description
A complete RESTful TODO API built with Express.js featuring full CRUD operations, CORS support, UUID-based IDs, input validation, and proper HTTP status codes.

## Tech Stack
| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Language** | javascript |
| **Framework** | express |

## Dependencies
No external dependencies detected.

## How to Run
```bash
npm install
node server.js
```
